action.message: Always treat terse continuation signals as authorizing execution-axis autonomy only; never interpret them as implicit approval for shared-state mutations (git push, PR creation, external messages) regardless of how positive the session momentum feels.

Always include 'what was tried and why it failed' as a mandatory field in core-dump and checkpoint artifacts, so resumed sessions inherit the negative-result record and don't re-enter a thrash loop from a clean-looking state.
